runs.brief_en: Elon Musk sharply criticized Rep. Ro Khanna over DOGE/USAID cuts, calling him an 'evil liar' and 'Ro the Robber', accusing fraud and insider trading while defending DOGE's verification standards and suggesting lawsuits or prison. He affirmed 'McCarthy was right' on denaturalizing terrorists and that media's 'White Supremacy' surge is manufactured anti-white racism. Tesla amplified strong FSD v14+ user feedback.
runs.brief_zh: 馬斯克猛烈反擊眾議員Ro Khanna在DOGE/USAID削減議題上，稱其為「邪惡的騙子」和「搶劫的Ro」，指控詐欺與內線交易，捍衛DOGE驗證標準並建議訴訟或入獄。他肯定「麥卡錫是對的」（關於剝奪恐怖分子公民權），並指媒體「白人至上」使用量激增是製造的反白人種族主義。Tesla分享FSD v14+強力用戶正面反饋。

items_flat.title_en: Elon Musk Accuses Rep. Ro Khanna of Lying on DOGE/USAID, Calls for Accountability and Legal Action
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克指控眾議員Ro Khanna在DOGE/USAID議題上撒謊 呼籲追究責任與法律行動
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk stated that DOGE's standard was simple: require contact information for aid recipients to confirm it is not fraudulent. He accused money being sent to corrupt politicians under the guise of aid and labeled Rep. Ro Khanna ('Ro the Robber') a liar and stock insider trader who should be in prison. In related posts, Musk called Khanna an 'evil liar' and said 'Time to sue this liar' over claims blaming DOGE cuts for 4.5 million child deaths from USAID.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克表示DOGE的標準非常簡單：要求援助接收者提供聯絡資訊以確認非詐欺。他指控錢在援助幌子下流向腐敗政客，並稱眾議員Ro Khanna（「搶劫的Ro」）是騙子與股票內線交易者，應該進監獄。在相關貼文中，馬斯克稱Khanna為「邪惡的騙子」，並對其指控DOGE削減導致450萬兒童死亡的說法表示「是時候起訴這個騙子了」。
items_flat.musk_quote: The standard applied by DOGE was very simple and easy: Provide contact information for the recipients of aid, so that we can confirm it is not fraudulent. The reality is that money was being sent to corrupt politicians under the guise of aid! Liars and stock insider traders like Ro the Robber should be in prison!!
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: DOGE採用的標準非常簡單易懂：提供援助接收者的聯絡資訊，以便我們確認不是詐欺。現實是，錢在援助的幌子下被送給腐敗的政客！像「搶劫的Ro」這樣的騙子和股票內線交易者應該進監獄！！

links.label: Elon Musk on X (Time to sue this liar)
Elon Musk on X (He’s such an evil liar)

items_flat.title_en: Elon Musk: Massive Rise in Media 'White Supremacy' Term is Manufactured Leftist Anti-White Racism
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：媒體「白人至上」一詞使用量大增是製造的反白人種族主義
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk replied 'True' to analysis showing explosive increases in media usage of the term 'White Supremacy' (e.g., LA Times up 9749% from 2010-2020). He agreed it was not organic but a Leftist creation manufactured to push anti-white racism.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克回覆「True」，同意分析顯示媒體使用「白人至上」一詞的次數爆炸性增長（例如洛杉磯時報2010-2020年增長9749%）。他認為這不是自然現象，而是左派製造的反白人種族主義敘事。

items_flat.title_en: Elon Musk: 'McCarthy Was Right' on Stripping Citizenship from Those Joining Terrorist Groups
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：「麥卡錫是對的」 支持剝奪加入恐怖組織者的公民權
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk replied 'McCarthy was right' to a post praising DOJ use of 1952 law to denaturalize a Somali citizen who joined al-Shabaab terrorists months after naturalization. He supported rejecting 'McCarthyism' smears and enforcing loyalty as a contract for citizenship.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克回覆「McCarthy was right」，支持司法部使用1952年法律，剝奪一名索馬利歸化公民（入籍後數月即加入伊斯蘭恐怖組織al-Shabaab）的公民權。他認為應拒絕「麥卡錫主義」抹黑，並將忠誠視為公民權的契約。
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: McCarthy was right（麥卡錫是對的）

items_flat.title_en: Tesla Amplifies User Praise: FSD Supervised 'Like Going from Black and White to Color TV'
items_flat.title_zh: Tesla轉發用戶讚譽：FSD Supervised「如同從黑白電視進入彩色電視」
items_flat.summary_en: Tesla quoted a user describing FSD Supervised v14+ as transformative after long road trips and daily use: 'it’s like going from black and white to color TV.' When driving a regular car again, even a 'better' one, the user felt they were 'dumb having to drive yourself.'
items_flat.summary_zh: Tesla轉發用戶體驗：FSD Supervised v14+在長途與日常使用後帶來革命性改變，「如同從黑白電視進入彩色電視」。當再次駕駛一般汽車（即使是「更好的」車）時，用戶感覺「自己開車很蠢」。

tesla.title_en: Tesla Amplifies User Praise: FSD Supervised 'Like Going from Black and White to Color TV'
tesla.title_zh: Tesla轉發用戶讚譽：FSD Supervised「如同從黑白電視進入彩色電視」
tesla.summary_en: Tesla quoted a user describing FSD Supervised v14+ as transformative after long road trips and daily use: 'it’s like going from black and white to color TV.' When driving a regular car again, even a 'better' one, the user felt they were 'dumb having to drive yourself.'

He affirmed 'McCarthy was right' on denaturalizing terrorists and that media's 'White Supremacy' surge is manufactured anti-white racism. Tesla amplified strong FSD v14+ user feedback.
